method.beta_mode_caveat: families are market-mode dominated (off-diag corr floors ~0.55 even at max grid distance); the MP clip folds the bulk into that mode, so Meff ~1.1-1.75 regardless of spread. The PF2/PF3 phase must count independence on the market-mode-stripped structure before any measured reduction may reach the gate's N.
method.direction_note: REFERENCE VALUES, not a sanctioned reduction: for a reduction ratio the safe aggregate is max/1.0, and p75 under-covers the top quartile — recorded as the sweep-family LOWER bound alongside ratio_max. The v1 wire applies NO reduction (raw visited count).
method.estimator: participation ratio (sum(ev))^2/sum(ev^2) on the MP-clipped (sigma^2=1, trace-preserving) correlation spectrum; q = n_settings/(bars_inwindow-1)
